title: 10 best herbal essential oils for ulcerative colitis
description: Thymus vulgaris, also known as thyme, essential oils helps with ulcerative colitis because of its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The oil has been shown to reduce inflammation in the gut and promote healing of the intestinal lining. Thymus vulgaris essential oils also contains antioxidants that help combat oxidative stress, a common factor in the development of ulcerative colitis.
